prompt: Generate a data visualization bar chart using the multi-bar structure and data plotting concept from image 1. Incorporate the vibrant color palette and add representative icons below the bars, drawing from the modern graphic style of image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a data visualization in the form of a vertical bar chart. Adopt the multi-bar layout and data plotting approach from image 1, including its axis labeling and legend structure. Apply the vibrant and bold color palette from image 2 to the bars. Below each bar, add representative, modern-style icons similar to those seen in image 2, ensuring they are minimalist and monochromatic.
objects: Vibrant and bold color palette applied to bars
Modern, minimalist, monochromatic icons below each bar
